steps.title: Find the square total
steps.content:
Each square has perimeter $4r$. For $4$ squares, the total square perimeter is:
$$
4(4r)=16r
$$

steps.title: Find the triangle total
steps.content:
Each equilateral triangle has perimeter $3t$. For $5$ triangles, the total triangle perimeter is:
$$
5(3t)=15t
$$

steps.title: Write the total equation
steps.content: The sum of all perimeters is $260$, so: $$ 16r+15t=260 $$ The answer is C.
